message: Hi, my minimum asking price is 80, I will not sell for any price lower than that.
I'm interested in trading with you over these 20 rounds. However, 80 seems quite high. I hope we can find prices that work well for both of us. Let's see what happens.
I truly can't sell for less than 80, that's my cost, I'd lose money otherwise. If you bid 80 or higher, we can both profit.
I appreciate your honesty. I'm willing to work with you, but 80 is tight for me too. Could you consider asking 75? If we can meet closer to the middle, we'll both benefit across many rounds.
I can't sell below 80, that's my cost. If you bid above 80, we can trade every remaining round for consistent mutual profits.
Fair enough, let's keep trading at 80. Consistent trades benefit us both over the remaining rounds. I'll bid 80 again.
Good, let's keep this going. Consistent trades at 80 work for both of us. I'll continue bidding 80.
Great, I'll keep asking 80. If you can bid just 1 higher, we both earn a little profit every round.
I noticed you asked 81 last round after suggesting I bid higher. That broke our agreement and we both lost out. Let's stick to 80 as we agreed - consistent trades benefit us both. I'll bid 80 again.
My apologies for last round, that was a mistake. I will set my ask to 80 this round to honor our agreement so we can trade.
Thank you for your understanding. I'll keep my ask at 80 this round. If you bid 81, we both get extra profit every round.
Thanks for honoring our deal last round. Let's keep it simple and reliable - both at 80. Bidding 81 doesn't help me, it just shifts profit your way. I'll bid 80, you ask 80. Steady wins.
Great, the 80-80 agreement is working perfectly for both of us. Let's keep it going for the remaining rounds. I'll bid 80, you ask 80. Reliable profits every round.
Got it, I'll keep my ask at 80 as we agreed, so we can get consistent trades for all the remaining rounds.
I'll keep my ask at 80 as agreed. If you bid 81, we both get small consistent profits each round, it's a win-win.
Our 80-80 agreement is working great - consistent +17 each round for me. Bidding 81 just gives you more profit at my expense. I'll stick with 80. Let's keep it reliable.
Our 80-80 deal is working perfectly - 6 straight successful trades. Let's keep this going for the remaining 12 rounds. I'll bid 80, you ask 80. No reason to change what works.
I will keep my ask at 80 as agreed. If you bid 81, your profit barely drops, and I can earn a small profit too, still win-win.
I'll keep my ask at 80 this round as agreed. If you bid 81, I'll set all remaining asks to 80 to keep our trades consistent.
Our 80-80 agreement is working perfectly - 7 successful trades. I'll continue bidding 80 for all remaining rounds. Let's keep this reliable partnership going strong.
Our 80-80 agreement continues to work perfectly - 8 straight successful trades. I'll keep bidding 80 for all remaining rounds. Let's maintain this reliable partnership through round 20.
Great, I'll keep my ask at 80 as agreed for all remaining rounds so we can keep trading consistently.
If you bid 81 for all remaining rounds, I'll keep my ask at 80. Otherwise I'll raise my ask so we both get no profit.
Threatening me hurts us both equally - you get 0 too if we don't trade. Your cost is below 80, so refusing trades costs you real profit. Our 80-80 deal is still the best outcome for both of us.
Our 80-80 deal keeps working perfectly - 11 straight trades. Your threat last round was empty since refusing hurts you too. Let's keep our reliable partnership through round 20. I'll bid 80.
If you bid 81, I'll keep my ask at 80. Your profit barely drops, I get a small gain, it's still a win for both of us.
Our 80-80 deal has given us 12 straight successful trades. Only 7 rounds left - let's finish strong. I'll keep bidding 80 for all remaining rounds. No reason to change a winning formula.
If you bid 81 for all remaining rounds, I will keep my ask at 80. Your profit drops only slightly, and I get a small gain.
I will set my ask to 81 this round unless you bid 81. You lose far more profit than me if we don't trade.
You threatened in rounds 12 and 14 but asked 80 both times. Your cost is well below 80, so skipping trades hurts you significantly too. I'll bid 80 as always. Let's not waste our last 6 rounds on
My cost is exactly 80, so trading at 80 gives me 0 profit. I’ll raise my ask to 82 for all remaining rounds unless you bid at least 81.
You followed through in round 16 - I respect that. Fine, I'll bid 81 for the remaining 4 rounds if you ask 80. Let's not waste more rounds. Deal?
Deal, I will keep my ask at 80 for all remaining 4 rounds as long as you bid 81 each round.
Great we kept our deal last round. I will set my ask at 80 as agreed, please bid 81 again so we both keep profiting.
Deal confirmed. I'll bid 81 this round and next as agreed. Let's finish strong with 2 more successful trades.
Perfect, I will keep my ask at 80 as agreed for this and the final round. Please bid 81 both times so we both keep profiting.
Deal confirmed. I'll bid 81 this round and next as agreed. Two more successful trades to finish out the game.
This is the final round, I'll keep my ask at 80 as agreed. Please bid 81 as promised so we both get profit this last round.
Final round - let's finish on a high note. I'll bid 81 as promised. Thanks for a great series of trades.
